Plaintiff Jp Morgan Chase Bank, National Association'S Order To Show Cause Why The Appointment Of The Receiver Should Not Be Confirmed
Off Calendar May-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank National Associations Order to Show Cause why the appointment of the receiver should not be confirmed (per ex parte Order of 5/7/09). No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The Court grants and confirms receiver. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
